description_long: This shotgun features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly matte black and gray color scheme. The body is composed of a robust receiver with a full stock and a pistol grip, providing ergonomic support for the user. A prominent scope or sighting device is mounted on the top rail, enhancing aiming precision. The barrel is single and relatively short, with a cylindrical fore-end and a visible vertical grip beneath for improved handling. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing the trigger securely. Subtle turquoise accents are present on the grip and fore-end, adding a touch of color to the otherwise utilitarian appearance.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with a full stock, pistol grip, mounted sight, and turquoise accent details. It has a single barrel and a vertical foregrip for enhanced control.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the stock, pistol grip, mounted sight, and vertical foregrip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the single barrel, sight alignment, and the vertical foregrip directly beneath the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the stock, grip, and sight.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the alignment of the sight, with the pistol grip and trigger guard visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
